queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis evaluates the risk-mitigating impact of lacking a checking account on credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Determinants of default research investigates the inverse correlation between negative checking account balances and credit risk exposure.
Credit risk drivers literature examines how extended loan durations influence reduced borrower default probability.
